nodes.label: Local-First Pattern
nodes.rationale: All data stored locally via IndexedDB/Dexie; no user accounts means no PII; collection up to 10,000 records offline.

nodes.label: Offline-First Design
nodes.rationale: Graceful degradation when offline: cached reports, queued scans for later processing, service worker caching.

nodes.label: Multi-Model LLM Architecture
nodes.rationale: Vision LLM (GPT-4o/Gemini) identifies record from image; Research LLM (Claude/GPT-4) provides deep rarity/value analysis; structured JSON output with cross-reference to Discogs to mitigate hallucination risk.

nodes.label: Phased Development Approach
nodes.rationale: Platform distribution evolves incrementally: MVP as PWA (web), v1.0 wraps with Capacitor for iOS/Android, future native features via Capacitor plugins.

nodes.label: Mobile Deployment Dual Pathway
nodes.rationale: Two build pathways coexist: CI/GitHub Actions (tag-triggered, unsigned debug artifacts) and EAS Build (manual, signed store-grade). They are not wired together — EAS is configured but never invoked by CI.

nodes.label: TypeScript 6.0 Quirks
nodes.rationale: vite.config.ts is not type-checked (lives outside tsconfig project references); ignoreDeprecations 6.0 for baseUrl+paths; verbatimModuleSyntax requires import type for type-only imports; noUnusedLocals+noUnusedParameters enforced.

nodes.label: Vitest Configuration
nodes.rationale: Config in package.json under vitest key (not separate file); jsdom environment; globals enabled; setup file at src/test/setup.ts.

nodes.label: Tailwind CSS v4 Setup
nodes.rationale: No config file; imported via @import tailwindcss in src/index.css; configured as Vite plugin (@tailwindcss/vite); no tailwind.config.* to edit.
